title: Kings Born
description: This is a medieval modpack that lets you play how you want to, cozy, dangerous, or whatever you want.
body:
![A Title Image of Kings Born](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff4e52e294b9e73ed452b0f68d7095a5388430f1.png)


This is medieval modpack that allows you to play however you want, from a farmer to a soldier. This modpack can be very cozy or filled with danger. You can explore the beautiful terrain and find many structures useful no matter how far you have progressed. There is reactive medieval music to get you in the mood and immerse you into this world. The terrain also helps significantly, with every biome reworked and even new biomes this mod is severely underated.


### Options:
**If you don't like some features here are some mods or resource packs you might want to remove**
- Automatic Terrain slabs,
Countered's Terrain Slabs
- Overhauled Structures,
All Yung's mods
- New Seasons,
Fabric Seasons and all extras
- Custom Player Animations,
Detailed Animations
- Custom Mob Animations,
Fresh Animations



## Includes:
- Reactive Medieval Music
- Immersive Sound Effects
- Beautiful World Generation
- Overhauled Structures
- New Structures
- New Blocks
- New Armor and Equipment
- Immersive effects
- Minimap and Worldmap
- Seasons
- New Foods
- Better Trees
- Better Inventory effects
- New Ore
- Better Player Animations
- Better Mob Animations
- Connected Textures
